expected_properties: When binary sum of A + B + Cin exceeds 9, Sum equals (binary_sum + 6) modulo 16
Cout is asserted (1) for those overflow cases
additional_cases.goal: Validate the BCD correction logic for overflow scenarios
notes: Uses input patterns that force the binary sum > 9 to trigger the correction addition of 6
stimulus_intent: Drive inputs that produce a binary sum greater than 9 to exercise the correction path
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after inputs settle; no fixed‑latency assumption

expected_properties: Module produces deterministic Sum and Cout values even when A or B contain non‑BCD digits (0xA‑0xF)
No contract‑specified error or undefined behavior is triggered
additional_cases.goal: Check behavior with out‑of‑range BCD inputs
notes: Contract does not define illegal input constraints; this case ensures graceful handling
stimulus_intent: Apply values 0xA‑0xF to A or B while varying Cin

expected_properties: Sum reflects the BCD‑corrected addition of A, B, and Cin
Cout indicates whether the BCD sum required a carry
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Exercise representative legal input combinations and verify BCD‑specific output mapping
notes: Enriches the basic sanity case with BCD‑operation focus while preserving original intent
stimulus_intent: Drive a variety of legal BCD digit pairs and carry‑in values
timing_assumptions: No assumptions on internal pipeline depth
